DFFlagBtfUseAssetRequest_Staged.purpose: Improves the speed and reliability of loading game assets.

FIntRelocateMobileMenuButtonsVariant_IXP.mechanism: Changes the layout of buttons in the mobile menu.
FIntRelocateMobileMenuButtonsVariant_IXP.purpose: Enhances user experience by making navigation easier on mobile devices.

FFlagEnableAutoLoginAfterRecovery_Staged.mechanism: Automatically logs the player back in after account recovery.
FFlagEnableAutoLoginAfterRecovery_Staged.purpose: Simplifies the process for players to return to their games after recovering their accounts.

DFFlagVideoGamePreviewOpenedAndLoadedTra.mechanism: Tracks when a video game preview is opened and fully loaded.
DFFlagVideoGamePreviewOpenedAndLoadedTra.purpose: Provides better analytics for developers to understand player engagement with game previews.

FFlagUserFixOrbitalCameraAzimuth.mechanism: Adjusts the camera controls for a smoother orbital view.
FFlagUserFixOrbitalCameraAzimuth.purpose: Improves the camera experience for players, making it easier to navigate around their avatars.

FStringTextureTranscodeNewFidelityETC_St.mechanism: Improves the way textures are processed and compressed for better quality.
FStringTextureTranscodeNewFidelityETC_St.purpose: Players will see higher-quality textures in games, enhancing visual experience.

FFlagFoundationPopoverFocusTrap_Staged.mechanism: Restricts keyboard focus within pop-up menus to improve navigation.
FFlagFoundationPopoverFocusTrap_Staged.purpose: Players will have a smoother experience when interacting with pop-ups, making it easier to use.
